$comment: Cache file for inbound report discovery (P079 / ADR-062). Written by /wr-itil:review-problems Step 8.5 after each discovery pass.
$last_pass_note: /wr-itil:review-problems Step 4.5 discovery pass 2026-06-26 (TTL-expiry auto-recheck; cache was 5d stale). 4 fresh inbound reports captured as Tier-1 local tickets (Origin: inbound-reported): #274->P382 (work-problems iter subprocesses miss project-scoped plugins, need --plugin-dir), #282->P383 (capture-problem --persona enum rejects adopter personas), #283->P384 (external-comms agent no credibility/self-own axis), #284->P385 (work-problems pre-dispatch relevance-close). All four lack the [problem] title prefix and were only surfaced because this pass polled --state open unfiltered (class P373: the title_prefix filter would have discarded them). Per the 2026-05-15 discovery-only direction, ack comments deferred (external-comms-gate sha-bug bottleneck) AND these are the maintainer's own issues, so reporter-ack adds no value. JTBD-alignment + dual-axis-risk: all safe-and-valid (well-formed adopter-sourced reports, plugin-developer persona, no Axis-1/Axis-2 risk).

github-issues:windyroad/agent-plugins.filter: title_prefix=[problem] (label filter removed; see channels-config $filter-note). NOTE 2026-06-26 pass polled --state open UNFILTERED to catch non-prefixed inbound (P373)
